category_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/AmrDeveloper/GQL describes GitQL as an extensible SQL-like query language and SDK for sources including .git files.
source_facts.description says GQL is a Git Query Language for querying .git files.
display_name_sources: Official repository description uses GitQL for the project represented by the brew formula gql.
Official repository documentation section is titled GitQL Documentation.
docs_sources: Official repository links Full Documentation to amrdeveloper.github.io.
source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site at https://amrdeveloper.github.io/GQL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/AmrDeveloper/GQL; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository documentation describes GitQL documentation and SDK customization.
source_facts.description identifies SQL-like queries on .git files.
